nasb.text: Now the sons of Israel had done according to the word of Moses, for they had requested from the Egyptians articles of silver and articles of gold, and clothing;

esv.text: The people of Israel had also done as Moses told them, for they had asked the Egyptians for silver and gold jewelry and for clothing.

cnv.text: 以色列人照著摩西的話行了，他們向埃及人索取銀器金器和衣服。

ccb.text: 又遵照摩西的吩咐向埃及人索取金器、银器和衣服。
